Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

public static class RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder extends OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
Builder class.

    • build

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession build()
      Description copied from class: MarshallingSession.Builder
      Build the object.
      Overrides:
      build in class OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Returns:
      The built object.

    • debug

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder debug(Boolean value)
      Description copied from class: ContextSession.Builder
      Debug mode.

      Enables the following additional information during parsing:

      • When bean setters throws exceptions, the exception includes the object stack information in order to determine how that method was invoked.

      If not specified, defaults to Context.Builder.debug().

      See Also:
      • MarshalledConfig.debug()
      • Context.Builder.debug()
      Overrides:
      debug in class ContextSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null, defaults to Context.isDebug().
      Returns:
      This object.

    • javaMethod

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder javaMethod(Method value)
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession.Builder
      The java method that called this serializer, usually the method in a REST servlet.
      Overrides:
      javaMethod in class SerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new property value.
      Can be null (value will not be set, existing value will be kept).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • locale

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder locale(Locale value)
      Description copied from class: MarshallingSession.Builder
      The session locale.

      Specifies the default locale for serializer and parser sessions.

      If not specified, defaults to MarshallingContext.Builder.locale(Locale).

      See Also:
      • MarshalledConfig.locale()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.locale(Locale)
      Overrides:
      locale in class MarshallingSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null defaults to MarshallingContext.getLocale()
      Returns:
      This object.

    • mediaType

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder mediaType(MediaType value)
      Description copied from class: MarshallingSession.Builder
      The session media type.

      Specifies the default media type value for serializer and parser sessions.

      If not specified, defaults to MarshallingContext.Builder.mediaType(MediaType).

      See Also:
      • MarshalledConfig.mediaType()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.mediaType(MediaType)
      Overrides:
      mediaType in class MarshallingSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null defaults to MarshallingContext.getMediaType().
      Returns:
      This object.

    • mediaTypeDefault

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder mediaTypeDefault(MediaType value)
      Description copied from class: MarshallingSession.Builder
      Same as MarshallingSession.Builder.mediaType(MediaType) but doesn't overwrite the value if it is already set.
      Overrides:
      mediaTypeDefault in class MarshallingSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null, then the locale defined on the context is used.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • properties

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder properties(Map<String,Object> value)
      Description copied from class: ContextSession.Builder
      Session properties.

      Session properties are generic key-value pairs that can be passed through the session and made available to any customized serializers/parsers or swaps.

      Overrides:
      properties in class ContextSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • property

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder property(String key, Object value)
      Description copied from class: ContextSession.Builder
      Adds a property to this session.

      If the key matches a known session property (e.g. "debug" or "ContextSession.debug"), the value is converted via BasicConverter and routed to the corresponding typed setter. Unknown keys are stored in the raw session properties map.

      Overrides:
      property in class SerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      key - The property key.
      Cannot be null.
      value - The property value.
      Can be null (resets typed properties to their default; removes raw properties).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • resolver

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder resolver(VarResolverSession value)
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession.Builder
      String variable resolver.

      If not specified, defaults to session created by VarResolver.DEFAULT.

      Overrides:
      resolver in class SerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new property value.
      Can be null (value will not be set, defaults to session created by VarResolver.DEFAULT when accessed).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • schema

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder schema(HttpPartSchema value)
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession.Builder
      HTTP-part schema.

      Used for schema-based serializers and parsers to define additional formatting.

      Overrides:
      schema in class SerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      Can be null (value will not be set, existing value will be kept).
      Returns:
      This object.

    • schemaDefault

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder schemaDefault(HttpPartSchema value)
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession.Builder
      Same as SerializerSession.Builder.schema(HttpPartSchema) but doesn't overwrite the value if it is already set.
      Overrides:
      schemaDefault in class SerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null, then the locale defined on the context is used.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • timeZone

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder timeZone(TimeZone value)
      Description copied from class: MarshallingSession.Builder
      The session timezone.

      Specifies the default timezone for serializer and parser sessions.

      If not specified, defaults to MarshallingContext.Builder.timeZone(TimeZone).

      See Also:
      • MarshalledConfig.timeZone()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.timeZone(TimeZone)
      Overrides:
      timeZone in class MarshallingSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null defaults to MarshallingContext.getTimeZone().
      Returns:
      This object.

    • timeZoneDefault

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder timeZoneDefault(TimeZone value)
      Description copied from class: MarshallingSession.Builder
      Same as MarshallingSession.Builder.timeZone(TimeZone) but doesn't overwrite the value if it is already set.
      Overrides:
      timeZoneDefault in class MarshallingSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      If null, then the locale defined on the context is used.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • unmodifiable

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder unmodifiable()
      Description copied from class: ContextSession.Builder
      Create an unmodifiable session.

      The created ContextSession object will be unmodifiable which makes it suitable for caching and reuse.

      Overrides:
      unmodifiable in class ContextSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Returns:
      This object.

    • uriContext

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder uriContext(UriContext value)
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession.Builder
      URI context bean.

      Bean used for resolution of URIs to absolute or root-relative form.

      If not specified, defaults to Serializer.Builder.uriContext(UriContext).

      Overrides:
      uriContext in class SerializerSession.Builder<RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder>
      Parameters:
      value - The new property value.
      Can be null (value will not be set, defaults to Serializer.Builder.uriContext(UriContext) from context).
      Returns:
      This object.
